signatures.coordination: atom at 0 + missing mass at small undercuts; ties formed by upward moves; ties at first-party focal price; breaks upward
signatures.competition: smooth small-undercut mass; ties formed downward; breaks downward

claim_boundary: Single-mover tie events only (multi-mover ticks skipped); first-party matching by author-name heuristic; 5-min grid means sub-tick sequencing within a tie tick is unobserved.
